home.subtitle: Enterprise admin framework with Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite
home.intro: Single-app architecture with layout, permission, i18n, theme and system modules out of the box.

advantages.singleApp: Single-app build: one codebase one output, clear structure, easy maintenance
advantages.techStack: Modern stack: Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia, Element Plus, UnoCSS, vue-i18n, Alova
advantages.fastBuild: Fast build: Vite (rolldown) quick cold start & HMR, code-split and i18n bundles
advantages.enterprise: Enterprise features: permission (route + v-permission), Token/401, safe render, update notice, analytics

capabilities.layout: Layout & menu: sidebar + tab bar + keep-alive cache, route meta drives menu and permission filter
capabilities.request: Request & Mock: Alova wrapper, Token injection, global Loading; MSW Mock out of the box
capabilities.i18n: i18n: vue-i18n multi-locale, supports zh-CN, en, etc.
capabilities.theme: Theme: light / dark / system, UnoCSS dark: and Element Plus dark mode
capabilities.system: System management: menu, area, dept, dict, role modules with permission codes and Mock out of the box

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: This page failed to render. Try refreshing or go back home.

validation.phone: Please enter a valid phone number

common.delConfirmTip: This action cannot be undone. Continue?

webUpdateNotice.title: System update
webUpdateNotice.description: A new version is available. Please refresh the page.

piniaDemo.title: Pinia State Management Demo
piniaDemo.description: This page demonstrates Pinia usage scenarios and methods in enterprise admin architecture

errors.403Desc: You do not have permission to access this page
errors.404Desc: The page you visited does not exist or has been removed

demo.title: Tech Stack Demo
demo.subtitle: Single App · Element Plus · UnoCSS · Alova · MSW Mock · i18n · Dayjs · Nprogress · Analytics

calendar.title: Teacher Schedule Demo (BusinessCalendar)
calendar.desc: Simulates teacher scheduling: mock schedule/lesson data, useCalendarData for slot split, BusinessCalendar for display; date select, event click, drag, context menu.
calendar.checklistHint: Per doc 4.0: view, interaction, config, event types, and business features are covered.

demo.timePageHint: See live-updating time on that page.
demo.routerDesc: Nprogress bar shows on route change. Click the button below to try.
demo.analyticsDesc: Matomo tracks page views on route change; GrowthBook for feature flags / A/B.
demo.iconsDesc: Iconify loads icons on demand; local SVGs in src/assets/icons/svg/ use SvgIcon.
demo.updateNoticeDesc: When a new version is detected, a notification appears in the bottom-right; you can manually check or click below to see a mock notification.
demo.piniaDesc: User / App / TabNav / FeatureFlags / Cache modules; persist. Try login and feature flags on the Pinia demo page.
demo.safeRenderDesc: Use v-dompurify-html instead of v-html; content is sanitized by DOMPurify before render to prevent XSS.
demo.permissionDesc: Route meta.roles / meta.permissions control access; v-permission controls button/area visibility.
demo.horizontalScrollDesc: Wrap wide el-table in an overflow-x-auto container for horizontal scrolling.
demo.richtextDesc: Rich text demo removed. You can add Quill, TinyMCE, etc. later.

richtext.title: Rich Text Editor Demo
richtext.subtitle: TinyMCE 8 self-hosted wrapper with v-model, i18n, image upload, word count; content displayed via v-dompurify-html.
richtext.basicDesc: v-model two-way binding, default toolbar and plugins, height 320px
richtext.heightDesc: Control editor height via height prop for short or long content
richtext.disabledDesc: When disabled is true, content is not editable
richtext.previewDesc: Content from the editor above is rendered here via v-dompurify-html to prevent XSS
richtext.previewEmpty: Content entered in the editor above will be safely rendered here.

countdown.title: Countdown Demo
countdown.subtitle: Countdown component and useCountdown composable for exam timing, event countdown, verification cooldown, etc.
countdown.autoDesc: 90 second countdown, autoStart on mount, emits finish when done
countdown.composableDesc: Using useCountdown logic only, custom UI layout

stepForm.title: Step Form Demo
stepForm.subtitle: StepFormContainer: steps, dynamic slots, onBeforeNext validation and submit.

formValidation.title: Form Validation Demo
formValidation.subtitle: VeeValidate + Zod and formRules: required, length, email, phone, number, etc.
formValidation.veeDesc: Declarative schema, TS inference; defineField binding, handleSubmit validation.
